summary: Iter 174 combo (Lifetime Savings + Web Push + Bot Cleanup). Backend 39/39 unit tests pass + 15/15 live-URL API tests pass (test_iter174_live_api.py). Frontend /admin/seo renders lifetime-savings-card (£6,460 net, refresh + breakdown toggle both work) and web-push-admin-collapsed → Open reveals composer (title/body/url/send) + stats + history. PushOptIn banner correctly absent on /admin/* (count=0) and wired in App.js:398 for storefront routes. Overall PASS.

minor.issue: Returns {count, rows} (not a bare list or {history:[]}). Docs in review-request implied 'rows of past broadcasts' — naming mismatch only, payload is valid.
Body schema expects {subscription: {...}} wrapper rather than the raw subscription dict shown in review-request other_misc_info. Works correctly; just a doc discrepancy.

issues: lifetime-savings-card is positioned BELOW seo-dashboard-summary (LSC y=960 vs dashboard y=457). Review-request described LSC as 'at top'. Because SeoDashboardSummary (iter173) already owns the top slot, this is acceptable. No action needed unless product disagrees.

critical_code_review_comments: services/lifetime_savings.py composer returns valid 6-row breakdown + all 6 totals keys. Fine.
services/web_push.py pywebpush wrapper correctly flags expired (410/404) subs and stores state in web_push_subscriptions. Fine.
routes/web_push.py enforces admin on /api/admin/push/*, public on /api/push/*. Validation via pydantic (title 1-120, body 1-240) correctly returns 422 on invalid input.
routes/stealth_seo.py:297 lifetime-savings endpoint correctly 401/403s anon and 200s admin. No _id leaks.

routes/analytics.py _looks_like_bot and _is_valid_tilestation_url: 22/22 unit tests PASS (Python-Requests, curl, wget, GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Perplexity, Bytespider, headless Chrome correctly flagged; Chrome/Safari/Firefox/Edge correctly passed; example.com URLs and unrelated domains rejected; tilestation.co.uk, relative paths, railway prod, emergent preview accepted).
POST /api/website/cleanup-bot-traffic: admin-gated, dry_run=true returns count without deleting, dry_run=false deletes. Verified live.

PushOptIn.jsx uses a 25-second pre-show delay + /admin route skip + localStorage 30-day cooldown + Notification.permission checks — hence count=0 on storefront at 5s wait is expected behavior, not a bug. Wiring confirmed at App.js:15 (import) and App.js:398 (<PushOptIn/>).

Pre-existing console errors on /admin (unrelated to this iteration): 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in AdminDashboard, 'body stream already read' in fetchProducts on storefront. Flagged in iter173; still present.
test_credentials: admin@test.com / admin123 — valid, used for admin endpoints and UI login
seed_data_creation: None. Broadcast test created one audit-log row in push_history (visible as count=1, rows=[...]). Fake subscription endpoint 'https://fcm.googleapis.com/fcm/send/iter174-test-endpoint' inserted then flagged inactive by unsubscribe test — no live FCM traffic sent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three features verified end-to-end on live preview URL. Key data-testids: lifetime-savings-card, lifetime-savings-net, lifetime-savings-toggle, lifetime-savings-refresh, seo-dashboard-summary, web-push-admin-collapsed, web-push-admin-open, web-push-admin-card, push-stat-active, push-stat-total, push-stat-status, push-broadcast-title, push-broadcast-body, push-broadcast-url, push-broadcast-send, push-history-list. Breakdown toggle expands to a real table (rows found in DOM). Bot cleanup and push broadcast are idempotent on dev DB. The subscribe request body must be {subscription: {...}} (not raw). Push history response is {count:int, rows:[...]}.
